name: Peasant Style Pate
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2 Combine all ingredients, except bacon, in a bowl. Mix lightly but thoroughly.
3 Fry 1 tablespoon of the mixture in a small skillet to test flavor. Adjust seasonings as needed.
4 Lay bacon slices side by side and barely touching on a baking sheet.
5 Form meat into a loaf shape and place it across the middle of the bacon slices.
6 Bring ends of bacon up to enclose the loaf.
7 Turn loaf over on top of bacon ends.
8 Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 90 minutes, basting often with any rendered fat.
9 Remove from oven and let cool thoroughly before slicing.
10 Serve at room temperature, with crackers or sliced breads to the side.
